strategies.hero: flex flex-col md:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-12

styles.pixel: font-['Press_Start_2P'] text-xs px-6 py-4 bg-[#8BAC0F] text-[#0f380f] hover:bg-[#9BBC0F] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#000] active:translate-y-1 active:shadow-none transition-all
styles.neon: font-['Space_Mono'] border border-[#00F0FF] text-[#00F0FF] hover:bg-[#00F0FF] hover:text-black shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] transition-all uppercase tracking-widest

Card.styles: bg-[#1a1a2e] border border-white/5 hover:border-primary/50 overflow-hidden relative group transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:shadow-2xl

Input.styles: bg-black/40 border-2 border-white/10 focus:border-primary text-white font-['Space_Mono'] placeholder:text-white/30 p-4 rounded-none

Badge.styles: font-['VT323'] text-lg px-2 py-0.5 bg-white/10 border border-white/20 text-white/90 uppercase

rules: Do not rely on color alone for game status

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts link to the HTML head immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to include the custom font families (Press Start 2P, VT323, etc.) and colors defined above.
3. BUILD LAYOUT: Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the game library. Avoid simple lists.
4. EMULATOR VIEW: Create a 'Theater Mode' for the emulator. Darken the background, center the screen, add a 'CRT' scanline overlay using CSS.
5. INTERACTION: Use the 'pixel' button style for primary actions (Play, Download).
6. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (e.g., 'game-card-mario', 'play-button').
7. NOSTALGIA: Use pixel art icons or 8-bit style SVGs where possible.
8. SOUND: (Optional) If possible, add subtle hover sounds (blip) using a simple audio hook, but keep it muted by default.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for modals/overlays.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN.
